name: docxodus
description: DOCX document comparison and HTML conversion in the browser using WebAssembly

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts && npm run build:pagination-bundle && npm run build:session-bundle && npm run build:editor-bundle && npm run build:worker-bundle
scripts.pretest: cp tests/test-harness.html dist/wasm/ && cp tests/worker-test-harness.html dist/wasm/ && cp tests/profiling-harness.html dist/wasm/ && cp dist/pagination.bundle.js dist/wasm/ && cp dist/session.bundle.js dist/wasm/ && cp dist/editor.bundle.js dist/wasm/ && cp dist/docxodus.worker.js dist/wasm/ && cp dist/worker-proxy.bundle.js dist/wasm/worker-proxy.js
scripts.demo: npm run build && npm run demo:serve
scripts.demo:serve: cp dist/editor.bundle.js examples/editor.html dist/wasm/ && cp ../TestFiles/HC031-Complicated-Document.docx dist/wasm/sample.docx && echo '\n>>> Open http://localhost:8088/editor.html\n' && python3 -m http.server 8088 --directory dist/wasm

author: JSv4
